Whether you're looking to promote a business, commemorate an event, or simply add some personal flair to your space, our custom magnets allow for a versatile yet effective way for you to share your message. Choose from a variety of magnet options below and begin crafting your custom order today. Truck Magnets View Product Car Magnets View Product Refrigerator Magnets View Product Photo Magnets View Product Dry Erase Magnets View Product Business Magnets View Product Bumper Magnets View Product Magnetic Signs View Product More About Our Magnet Products Custom Truck Magnets Truck magnets are a stylish yet durable way to showcase your brand on the move. Perfect for mobile marketing all while being easy to install, reposition, or remove. Custom Car Magnets Car magnets are a flexible and weatherproof way to advertise your business on the move. They’re easy to apply, remove, and swap whenever you want a fresh look! Custom Fridge Magnets Bring your refrigerator to life with custom fridge magnets! Whether you're displaying travel memories or promoting your business, these magnets are designed to stick to the things that matter. Custom Photo Magnets Bring any memory to life with custom photo magnets! These magnets are designed to be a stylish way to decorate practically any magnetic surface while highlighting the moments you love. Custom Dry Erase Magnets Get ready to stay on top of any to-do with our custom dry erase magnets! These reusable magnets can turn any surface into a colorful and creative planning space. Custom Business Magnets Help your business stay front and center with custom business card magnets! These magnets are perfect for handing out or mailing while keeping your brand visible on any magnetic surface. Frequently Asked Questions Return to Top Will a magnet stick to my car? Magnets only stick to magnetic (ferromagnetic) metal, such as steel, iron, nickel, and cobalt. They won’t stick to aluminum, fiberglass, carbon fiber, plastic, or most non-magnetic stainless steel. What are your custom magnets made of? Our magnets are made with standard 30 mil magnetic material or reflective 30 mil magnetic material. Both options are finished with a water- and scratch-resistant laminated surface for added durability. Are custom car magnets waterproof / weatherproof? They’re water-resistant, not fully waterproof. Light rain and normal outdoor use are fine, but we recommend removing magnets before car washes and avoiding trapped moisture underneath. How long do custom magnets last? With proper use and care, our magnets can last up to 5 years. Is there a minimum order quantity (MOQ)? No. There’s no minimum order—you can order one magnet or buy in bulk. Do you offer bulk discounts on custom magnets? Yes. Pricing is quantity-based—ordering more lowers the per-unit cost (you’ll see the discount update as you increase quantity). Do you print magnets in full color? Yes. All magnets are printed in full CMYK color. Can I write on my magnets (Sharpie or dry-erase)? How do I clean them? Yes. Use Sharpie for permanent text and dry-erase markers for temporary notes. To remove marker, clean gently with mild soap/water or a light cleaning solution (test a small area first). What are common uses for custom magnets? Popular uses include car/truck magnets for advertising, business card magnets for handouts or mailers, and refrigerator magnets for calendars, reminders, lists, and photos. Why Choose Banners.com? Customer Service Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers. Fast Turnaround Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule. Quality Products Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology.
